violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The can opener was sent to be cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the front food prep area and the back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit #3 in the front food preparation area. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The door to the employee toilet room locate directly off back kitchen in close proximity to food preparation, storage and sanitization is not self-closing. Establishment is to install a self-closing door. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2022

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with RIDOH at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to certify employee with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, Rice was placed in the refrigerator in covered containers prior to food items obtaining an internal temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Lids were removed and food items placed on top shelf and allowed to cool properly. Proper cooling methods were discussed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The cutting boards on the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, refrigerator door gaskets, and bottom inside surfaces of refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The door to the employee toilet room locate directly off back kitchen in close proximity to food preparation, storage and sanitization is not self-closing. Establishment is to install a self closing door. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2022
